====Pokémon====
This listing is of Diantha's known {{OBP|Pokémon|species}} in {{aniseries|PTS}}:

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Diantha
|stage1=Ralts
|stage2=Kirlia
|pkmn=Gardevoir
|mega=yes
|main=Diantha's Gardevoir
|type1=Psychic
|type2=Fairy
|img=Diantha Gardevoir.png
|cap=Diantha's Gardevoir
|img2=Diantha Mega Gardevoir.png
|cap2=Diantha's Mega Gardevoir
|epnum=XY028
|epname=The Bonds of Evolution!
|vajp=
|vaen=Michele Knotz
|desc={{p|Gardevoir}} is Diantha's first known Pokémon and is able to [[Mega Evolution|Mega Evolve]] into Mega Gardevoir.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Diantha
|pkmn=Aurorus
|type1=Rock
|type2=Ice
|img=Diantha Aurorus.png
|epnum=JN116
|epname=Pride of a Champion!
|vajp=
|vaen=Erica Schroeder
|desc={{p|Aurorus}} is Diantha's second known Pokémon. It was the first Pokémon Diantha used in her [[Masters Eight Tournament]] match against {{an|Lance}}, where it went up against his {{TP|Lance|Dragonite}}. Despite the type advantage, Aurorus was soon defeated.

In ''[[JN122|It's... Champion Time!]]'', Aurorus was used in Diantha's Masters Eight Tournament match against {{an|Leon}}, where it went up against Leon's {{p|Rillaboom}}, only to be defeated.

Aurorus's known moves are {{m|Light Screen}}, {{m|Blizzard}}, {{m|Reflect}}, and {{m|Rock Slide}}.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Diantha
|pkmn=Gourgeist
|type1=Ghost
|type2=Grass
|img=Diantha Gourgeist.png
|epnum=JN116
|epname=Pride of a Champion!
|vajp=
|vaen=
|desc={{p|Gourgeist}} is Diantha's third known Pokémon. It was the second Pokémon Diantha used in her [[Masters Eight Tournament]] match against {{an|Lance}}, where it went up against his {{TP|Lance|Gyarados}} and won, before losing to his {{p|Hydreigon}}.

In ''[[JN122|It's... Champion Time!]]'', Gourgeist was used in Diantha's Masters Eight Tournament match against {{an|Leon}}, where it went up against Leon's {{p|Rillaboom}}, only to be defeated.

Gourgeist's known moves are {{m|Trick-or-Treat}}, {{m|Shadow Sneak}}, and {{m|Phantom Force}}.}}
